response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development experience in industrial automation, high-performance systems, or secure embedded environments as required; their C++ exposure is limited to a brief academic/thesis project and is not reflected in professional roles, which are dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse systems
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring
Proven ability to deliver complex distributed and event-driven systems
concerns: No professional C++ or STL experience in industrial or embedded contexts
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) and protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
Primary tech stack is web-focused (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), not C++-centric high-performance systems
